title: make vendor: run `tidy` after `vendor`
body:
Run `go mod tidy` after `go mod vendor` to properly clean up the
dependencies.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM and happy green test buttons.

> It’s slightly worrying that this matters, documentation suggests the `vendor` subdirectory is just a substitute for network access.
> 
> But I did observe the same behavior.

Mystery resolved: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/890
